name: flightaware-mcp
description: Live flight tracking and aviation data via FlightAware AeroAPI — flights, airports, operators, schedules, and alerts

aeroapi_api_key.title: AeroAPI Key
aeroapi_api_key.description: Your FlightAware AeroAPI key (flightaware.com/aeroapi/portal). Free Personal tier is fine to start.

aeroapi_output_dir.title: Map Output Directory
aeroapi_output_dir.description: Default directory for flight-map PNGs (default: current working directory)

aeroapi_cache_ttl.title: Read Cache TTL (seconds)
aeroapi_cache_ttl.description: Cache identical GET responses for this many seconds to cut per-query billing (default: 15; set 0 to disable)

tools.name: fa_get_flights
tools.description: Get flights for an ident, registration, or fa_flight_id

tools.name: fa_search_flights
tools.description: Search airborne flights with the simplified query syntax

tools.name: fa_search_flights_advanced
tools.description: Search flights with the full Boolean query language

tools.name: fa_get_flight_track
tools.description: Get the position track for a flight

tools.name: fa_get_flight_position
tools.description: Get the latest position for an in-air flight

tools.name: fa_get_flight_route
tools.description: Get the decoded route for a flight

tools.name: fa_get_flight_map
tools.description: Render a map image (PNG) of a flight

tools.name: fa_get_flight_history
tools.description: Get historical flights for an ident (Standard/Premium tier)

tools.name: fa_search_flight_positions
tools.description: Search live flight positions with a structured query

tools.name: fa_count_flights
tools.description: Count flights matching a structured query

tools.name: fa_resolve_flight
tools.description: Resolve a flight ident to canonical (Standard/Premium tier)

tools.name: fa_get_airport
tools.description: Get details for an airport by code

tools.name: fa_get_airport_flights
tools.description: Get an airport flight board (arrivals/departures/scheduled)

tools.name: fa_list_airports
tools.description: List airports known to AeroAPI

tools.name: fa_get_nearby_airports
tools.description: Find airports near a latitude/longitude

tools.name: fa_get_airport_delays
tools.description: Get current airport delays

tools.name: fa_get_airport_weather
tools.description: Get airport METAR observations or TAF forecast

tools.name: fa_get_airport_flight_counts
tools.description: Get current flight counts at an airport

tools.name: fa_get_airport_routes
tools.description: Get popular routes between two airports

tools.name: fa_resolve_airport
tools.description: Resolve an airport code to canonical (Standard/Premium tier)

tools.name: fa_get_operator
tools.description: Get details for an operator (airline) by code

tools.name: fa_get_operator_flights
tools.description: Get an operator flight board

tools.name: fa_list_operators
tools.description: List operators (airlines) known to AeroAPI

tools.name: fa_get_aircraft_owner
tools.description: Get the registered owner of an aircraft

tools.name: fa_get_scheduled_flights
tools.description: Get airline-scheduled flights between two dates

tools.name: fa_foresight_search
tools.description: Predictive flight search via Foresight (premium tier)

tools.name: fa_list_alerts
tools.description: List configured flight alerts

tools.name: fa_get_alert
tools.description: Get a single configured flight alert

tools.name: fa_create_alert
tools.description: Create a flight alert (confirm-gated)

tools.name: fa_update_alert
tools.description: Update a flight alert (confirm-gated)

tools.name: fa_delete_alert
tools.description: Delete a flight alert (confirm-gated)

tools.name: fa_get_alerts_endpoint
tools.description: Get the alert delivery endpoint

tools.name: fa_set_alerts_endpoint
tools.description: Set the alert delivery endpoint (confirm-gated)
